title: Chernihiv: Drone attack
description: Russians damage agricultural facility in Chernihiv Oblast Russian forces struck a village in the Semenivka hromada in Chernihiv Oblast on the morning of 7 June, using an attack drone damaging a private agricultural facility. A hromada is an administrative unit designating a village, several villages, or a town, and their adjacent territories – ed. Read the full article on our website

As a result of the explosion, the building was partially destroyed...

title: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting...
title_en: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting...
title_uk: Зеленський намагався передати Путіну пропозицію особистої зустрічі...
description: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting through Abramovich, but was refused, - Financial Times FT with reference to four sources familiar with the situation, writes that on May 21, Russian oligarch Roman Abramovich secretly came to Kyiv and met with Zelensky. After that, the President of Ukraine asked him to convey to Putin a message about readiness for direct negotiations and a personal summit....
description_en: Zelensky tried to convey to Putin the offer of a personal meeting through Abramovich, but was refused, - Financial Times FT with reference to four sources familiar with the situation, writes that on May 21, Russian oligarch Roman Abramovich secretly came to Kyiv and met with Zelensky. After that, the President of Ukraine asked him to convey to Putin a message about readiness for direct negotiations and a personal summit....
description_uk: Зеленский пытался передать путину предложение о личной встрече через Абрамовича, но получил отказ, - Financial Times FT со ссылкой на четыре источника, знакомых с ситуацией, пишет, что 21 мая российский олигарх Роман Абрамович тайно приезжал в Киев и встречался с Зеленским. После этого президент Украины попросил его передать путину сообщение о готовности к прямым переговорам и личному саммиту....

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Update: Ukraine's Security Service says it considers Russia's strike on the spent storage facility in Chornobyl to be a war crime. "The explosion damaged the spent nuclear fuel reception and reloading building and the IAEA administrative building," the agency said in a statement. "Investigators from Ukraine's Security Service... are taking measures to find and punish those involved in this...

title: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of...
title_en: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of...
title_uk: 😏Українські дрони дарують росіянам омріяну відпустку: тисячі...
description: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of tourists cannot fly out of Sochi for the second day. The airport has a real resort vibe: people sleep on the floor, elevators break down due to overload, passengers feel sick from suffocation, and the flight board is almost empty. 39 flights were delayed on arrival, 37 on departure, and another 17 were cancelled. Lapota
description_en: 😏Ukrainian drones give Russians a dream vacation: thousands of tourists cannot fly out of Sochi for the second day. The airport has a real resort vibe: people sleep on the floor, elevators break down due to overload, passengers feel sick from suffocation, and the flight board is almost empty. 39 flights were delayed on arrival, 37 on departure, and another 17 were cancelled. Lapota
description_uk: 😏Украинские дроны устраивают россиянам отпуск мечты: тысячи туристов вторые сутки не могут улететь из Сочи В аэропорту настоящий курортный вайб: люди спят на полу, лифты выходят из строя от перегрузки, пассажирам становится плохо от духоты, а табло с рейсами практически пустые. На прилет задержаны 39 рейсов, на вылет — 37, еще 17 отменены. Ляпота.

title: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Even if the USA gives Ukraine all new missiles for Patriot, they will still not be enough against Russian ballistics, — Defense Express According to analysts, the Russian Federation releases up to 113 ballistic, aeroballistic and hypersonic missiles every month, for which Ukraine needs Patriot systems to intercept. For comparison: the American company Lockheed Martin now produces about 52 PAC-3 MSE missiles per month...
description_en: Even if the USA gives Ukraine all new missiles for Patriot, they will still not be enough against Russian ballistics, — Defense Express According to analysts, the Russian Federation releases up to 113 ballistic, aeroballistic and hypersonic missiles every month, for which Ukraine needs Patriot systems to intercept. For comparison: the American company Lockheed Martin now produces about 52 PAC-3 MSE missiles per month...
description_uk: Даже если США отдадут Украине все новые ракеты для Patriot, их все равно не хватит против российской баллистики, — Defense Express По данным аналитиков, рф ежемесячно выпускает до 113 баллистических, аэробаллистических и гиперзвуковых ракет, для перехвата которых Украине нужны системы Patriot. Для сравнения: американская компания Lockheed Martin сейчас производит около 52 ракет PAC-3 MSE в месяц...

title: Crimea: Drone strike
description: Update: Ukraine strikes oil depot, marine terminal in occupied Crimea, releases footage of attack. Ukrainian drones struck the Semikolodyansk oil depot near the town of Yedi Quyu in Russian-occupied Crimea overnight on June 7, Ukraine's Special Operations Forces reported.
description_en: Update: Ukraine strikes oil depot, marine terminal in occupied Crimea, releases footage of attack. Ukrainian drones struck the Semikolodyansk oil depot near the town of Yedi Quyu in Russian-occupied Crimea overnight on June 7, Ukraine's Special Operations Forces reported.
description_uk: Update: Ukraine strikes oil depot, marine terminal in occupied Crimea, releases footage of attack. Ukrainian drones struck the Semikolodyansk oil depot near the town of Yedi Quyu in Russian-occupied Crimea overnight on June 7, Ukraine's Special Operations Forces reported.

title: Kyiv: Ukraine, Russia agree to 'start from scratch' on POW lists after...
title_en: Kyiv: Ukraine, Russia agree to 'start from scratch' on POW lists after...
title_uk: Київ: Україна та Росія домовилися «почати з нуля» списки військовополонених після...
description: Ukraine, Russia agree to 'start from scratch' on POW lists after ombudsmen meet in Belarus. The June 5 meeting marks the start of a new phase of communication on prisoner and hostage issues after Russia appointed Lantratova as ombudswoman in May.
description_en: Ukraine, Russia agree to 'start from scratch' on POW lists after ombudsmen meet in Belarus. The June 5 meeting marks the start of a new phase of communication on prisoner and hostage issues after Russia appointed Lantratova as ombudswoman in May.

title: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to...
title_en: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to...
title_uk: ⛽️ Ласкаво просимо до «енергетичної супердержави» У Севастополі вирішили...
description: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to dispense gasoline by QR codes: no more than 20 liters per week per car. You can refuel only during the day, at special gas stations and only after the approval of the "controller". The funniest thing is that the QR codes for today ended literally a couple of hours after the system was launched. We are waiting for news about the lottery for the right to buy another 10 liters 🤡
description_en: ⛽️ Welcome to the "energy superpower" In Sevastopol, they decided to dispense gasoline by QR codes: no more than 20 liters per week per car. You can refuel only during the day, at special gas stations and only after the approval of the "controller". The funniest thing is that the QR codes for today ended literally a couple of hours after the system was launched. We are waiting for news about the lottery for the right to buy another 10 liters 🤡
description_uk: ⛽️ Добро пожаловать в «энергетическую сверхдержаву» В Севастополе бензин решили выдавать по QR-кодам: не более 20 литров в неделю на одну машину. Заправиться можно только днем, на специальных АЗС и только после одобрения «контролера». Самое смешное, что QR-коды на сегодня закончились буквально через пару часов после запуска системы. Ждем новости о лотереи на право купить еще 10 литров 🤡

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Russian drone strikes spent nuclear fuel storage facility in Chornobyl, causes fire, Energoatom says. The attack partially destroyed the facility's container reception building, though no spent nuclear fuel was being stored there at the time.
description_en: Russian drone strikes spent nuclear fuel storage facility in Chornobyl, causes fire, Energoatom says. The attack partially destroyed the facility's container reception building, though no spent nuclear fuel was being stored there at the time.

title: Energy infrastructure hit
description: Today, the Russians again struck a special area around the Chernobyl nuclear power plant. "Shahed" struck one of the buildings of the Centralized Storage of Spent Nuclear Fuel. An object of extremely critical infrastructure. And an extremely mean Russian strike. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine, the Ministry of Energy and all our services are already engaged in ensuring that each of the partners knows what happened. Russia...
description_en: Today, the Russians again struck a special area around the Chernobyl nuclear power plant. "Shahed" struck one of the buildings of the Centralized Storage of Spent Nuclear Fuel. An object of extremely critical infrastructure. And an extremely mean Russian strike. The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine, the Ministry of Energy and all our services are already engaged in ensuring that each of the partners knows what happened. Russia...
description_uk: Сьогодні росіяни знов завдали удару по особливій території навколо Чорнобильської атомної станції. «Шахед» уразив одну з будівель Централізованого сховища відпрацьованого ядерного палива. Об’єкт надзвичайно критичної інфраструктури. І надзвичайно підлий російський удар. МЗС України, Міністерство енергетики та всі наші служби вже займаються тим, щоб кожен із партнерів знав, що відбулося. Росія...

title: Casualties reported
description: Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga strongly condemned the Russian attack on the Centralized Storage of Spent Nuclear Fuel in the Chernobyl zone. As a result of the attack, the container reception building was partially destroyed and a fire broke out, which was promptly extinguished. The radiation background remains within normal limits, there are no casualties. Andriy Sybiga emphasized: 💬 "This is not the first time that Russia has put...
description_en: Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga strongly condemned the Russian attack on the Centralized Storage of Spent Nuclear Fuel in the Chernobyl zone. As a result of the attack, the container reception building was partially destroyed and a fire broke out, which was promptly extinguished. The radiation background remains within normal limits, there are no casualties. Andriy Sybiga emphasized: 💬 "This is not the first time that Russia has put...
description_uk: Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга рішуче засудив російський удар по Централізованому сховищу відпрацьованого ядерного палива в Чорнобильській зоні. Внаслідок атаки було частково зруйновано будівлю приймання контейнерів та сталася пожежа, яку оперативно ліквідували. Радіаційний фон залишається в межах норми, постраждалих немає. Андрій Сибіга наголосив: 💬 "Це не вперше Росія ставить...
